content.instruction: Read the passage and fill in the blanks with the correct verb form.

source.text: Maria is a school teacher. Every morning, she wakes up at six o'clock. She makes a cup of tea and reads the newspaper. After breakfast, she walks to school. Her students like her because she always smiles.

activities.instruction: Use the correct present tense form of the verb in brackets.

questions.Q2: She ___ (wake) up at six o'clock every morning.
